title: scabiosa crenata subsp. breviscapa
intro: Scabiosa crenata subsp. breviscapa, also known as Chinese buttonflower or Huang qin, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the honeysuckle family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scabiosa crenata subsp. breviscapa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. It is often prepared as a tea or dried powder for use in herbal preparations, and can also be found in supplements and capsules.
